text: [Skip to content](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/en/home.html#main) ![](<Base64-Image-Removed>) Scotia® online has a refreshed look and new features to support your investing experience. Take some time to get familiar with what’s new. **[Learn more](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/en/home/what-s-new/new-experience/learn.html)** × SPECIAL OFFER # If you can make dinner for a food critic, you can direct invest New clients can get up to **$10,000 cash** by opening and funding a new Scotia iTRADE® account\*. [Offer detailsOffer details](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/en/home/cash-free-trades-offer-w2026.html) ## Welcome to direct investing with Scotia iTRADE You’re in control of your investments with Scotia iTRADE’s direct investing platform. Whether you’re a first-time investor or someone with more experience, you’ll enjoy the flexibility to trade stocks, ETFs, options, and more from your desktop or mobile. Even better, Scotia® clients can transfer funds between the Scotia iTRADE and Scotia banking apps with a single sign-on. ## Why investors choose Scotia iTRADE Previouschevron-left Nextchevron-right ### **Convenient platforms** Choose between three high-powered, lightning-fast, and reliable [online trading platform options](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/en/home/why-itrade/powerful-platforms.html "powerful platform"). ### **Free market insights** Whether you’re a seasoned trader or just starting, you’ll benefit from our [online resources](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/en/home/learning-centre.html "learning center"), such as videos, webinars, and tools. ### **Save on trades** Explore your options for free trades, [200+ commission-free ETFs](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/en/home/investment-types-products/commission-free-etf.html "free trade ETFs"), and other [ways to save](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/en/home/pricing/ways-to-save.html "ways to save"). ## Benefits of Scotia iTRADE Previouschevron-left Nextchevron-right ![lightbulb icon](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/content/dam/scotiabank/canada/images/icons/lightbulb-icon.png) ### **Free tools and research** Access market research, technical analysis, and insights to empower your investment decisions. [Explore tools\\ \\ Explore tools](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/en/home/tools-and-research.html) ![transfer icon](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/content/dam/scotiabank/canada/images/icons/transfer-colour.svg) ### **Flexible funds transfer** Transfer funds easily between any Canadian bank account and a Scotia iTRADE account, precisely when and where you want it. [Explore transfer options\\ \\ Explore transfer options](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/en/home/where-to-start/how-to-add-funds-transfer-money.html) ![overdraft-protection icon](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/content/dam/icons/visual-id/svg/overdraft-protection/overdraft-protection-colour.svg) ### **Security guarantee** We’re invested in security—yours and ours. Clients benefit from the protections offered by Scotiabank’s Online Security Guarantee. [Find out how\\ \\ Find out how](https://www.scotiabank.com/ca/en/security/scotia-protects-you.html) ![index icon](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/content/dam/itrade/images/index-colour.svg) ### **Trade as low as $4.991** Enjoy the benefits of low commissions and an extensive range of products and services to meet your trading and investing needs. [Review pricing and fees\\ \\ Review pricing and fees](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/en/home/pricing.html) ## Helpful articles & videos Previouschevron-left Nextchevron-right ![mom and baby on a laptop](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/content/dam/itrade/images/ETF-Compared-tablet.jpg) ### ETFs compared: ETF vs. mutual funds vs. index funds Discover the differences and similarities between these fund options. [Read the article\\ \\ Read the article](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/en/home/learning-centre/posts.etf.etf-vs-mutual-funds-vs-index-funds.html) ![unused rrsp](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/content/dam/itrade/images/unused-rrsp-contribution-tablet.jpg) ### **Unused RRSP contributions** What are they, how do you find them, and what to do with them. [Read the article\\ \\ Read the article](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/en/home/learning-centre/posts.rrsp-and-tfsa.what-is-unused-rrsp-contribution.html) ![how stock market works](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/content/dam/itrade/images/how-the-stock-market-tablet.jpg) ### How the stock market works From buying shares to price drivers – learn stock market principles. [Read the article\\ \\ Read the article](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/en/home/learning-centre/posts.stocks.how-does-stock-market-works-guide.html) [Visit the Learning Centre](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/en/home/learning-centre.html) ## Open a Scotia iTRADE account today Opening an account will take about 15 minutes. Requirements include: [Open an accountStart an iTRADE account application](https://ico.scotiabank.com/en/public) ![](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/content/dam/itrade/images/icon-step1-60px@1x.png/_jcr_content/renditions/cq5dam.web.1280.1280.png) Canadian residency ![](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/content/dam/itrade/images/icon-step2-60px@1x.png/_jcr_content/renditions/cq5dam.web.1280.1280.png) Age of majority or above in your province of residence ![](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/content/dam/itrade/images/icon-step3-60px@1x.png/_jcr_content/renditions/cq5dam.web.1280.1280.png) A Social Insurance Number (SIN) ![](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/content/dam/itrade/images/icon-step4-60px@2x.png/_jcr_content/renditions/cq5dam.web.1280.1280.png) A legible copy of valid Canadian government-issued photo identification. Your name and address must match your application. ## We’re here to help Previouschevron-left Nextchevron-right ![other-questions icon](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/content/dam/scotiabank/advice/icons/other-questions-colour.svg) ### **Have a question?** We have the answers. [Explore our help centre\\ \\ Explore our help centre](https://help.scotiabank.com/category/scotia-itrade) ![phone icon](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/content/dam/icons/non-retail/svg/ContactUs.svg) ### **By phone** Call us toll-free and we can help with your questions or account inquiries. [Contact us\\ \\ Contact us](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/en/home/contact-us.html) ![talk-to-advisor icon](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/content/dam/scotiabank/canada/d2d/d2d-redesign/talk-to-advisor-colour.png) ### In Person Visit the Investor Centre or book an appointment at a branch nearest to you. [44 King St West Toronto ON Scotia Plaza (Lower Concourse)](https://maps.app.goo.gl/QyBT8yZMzHYdn2Ei6 "Visit our branch or book an appointment") [Book an appointment\\ \\ Book an appointment](https://hello.scotiabank.com/book/customer-flag) [Legal](https://www.scotiaitrade.com/en/home.html#legal) \* Conditions apply. Offer valid for new Scotia iTRADE® clients and applies to new accounts. For full details, visit [www.scotiaitrade.com/winter26](http://www.scotiaitrade.com/winter26). 1 To qualify for commissions of $4.99 flat per Canadian or US equities trade and $4.99 + $1.25/contract for each options trade, you must, during the immediately preceding calendar quarter, execute at least 150 commission-generating equity or options trades. Accounts with less than 150 commission-generating trades within a calendar quarter will qualify for commissions of $9.99 flat per Canadian or US equities trade and $9.99 + $1.25/contract for each options trade. Commission-generating trades are buys and sells of: Equities, Options, Mutual Funds subject to commissions and Fixed Income instruments. Buys and Sells of GICs, ETFs which do not generate a commission, Canada Savings Bonds and Provincial Savings Bonds are examples of trades that are not commission-generating. You must re-qualify each calendar quarter. New qualification status will be effective on the second business day of the calendar quarter. Fees for US transactions are charged in US dollars.
